items.text: ATTENTION RESIDENTS: Bike racks outside Maple Hall will be removed Friday, May 9, from 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM for sidewalk repairs. Please relocate bicycles to Tower Lot B before Thursday at 5:00 PM. A $25 fee applies to any bikes that must be cut off after the deadline.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when must bicycles be moved by?
questions.explanation: The notice states bicycles must be relocated to Tower Lot B before Thursday at 5:00 PM.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about bikes left at the rack past the deadline?

options.A: They will be returned to owners free of charge
options.B: They will be removed and the owner charged a fee
options.C: They will remain undisturbed during the repair
options.D: They will be transferred to the bike registration office

questions.explanation: The notice mentions a $25 fee for bikes that must be cut off after the deadline, implying removal with a charge.

items.text: Fire alarm testing will take place in Ridgewood Residence Hall on Tuesday, March 4, from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM. Brief alarm tones may sound multiple times. No evacuation is required. Please contact the Residence Office at 555-2034 if any alarm continues for more than thirty seconds during testing.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the testing occur?
questions.explanation: The notice states testing will take place on Tuesday, March 4, from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about alarms that ring longer than thirty seconds?

options.A: They are part of the standard testing protocol
options.B: They may indicate a real emergency rather than a test
options.C: They are scheduled for after eleven AM

questions.explanation: The notice asks residents to call the office if an alarm continues over thirty seconds, implying that prolonged alarms may signal a real fire.

items.text: So glad the Cedar Hill Campus Garden is finally back open for spring! Hours are Mondays and Saturdays, 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, starting March 24. Bring your own gloves. Volunteer slots fill fast — sign up at the kiosk by Hayes Hall. Cannot wait to see everyone digging in!

questions.stem: According to the post, when does the garden open?
questions.explanation: The post specifies Mondays and Saturdays, 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, starting March 24.

questions.stem: Where should interested students sign up?

options.C: At the kiosk by Hayes Hall

questions.explanation: The post says volunteers should sign up at the kiosk by Hayes Hall.

items.text: Hey everyone! Free outdoor yoga this Saturday, April 12, at 10:00 AM in the main quad. All experience levels welcome. Mat rental from Recreation Services is just $2. Bring a water bottle and wear comfortable clothes. Cannot wait to see you there!

questions.stem: According to the post, what is the cost to rent a mat?
questions.explanation: The post states that mat rental from Recreation Services is just $2.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the yoga session?

options.A: It is reserved for certified yoga instructors
options.B: It will be moved indoors if it rains
options.D: It is open to participants regardless of skill level

questions.explanation: The post explicitly says all experience levels are welcome, implying no skill requirement.
